items.description: Eve agent that runs a deterministic AI-SEO audit on a page through context.dev — scoring ~30 checks across six categories into a 0–100 total and returning failing checks and an agent-ready fix prompt.
items.name: eve/ai-seo-audit
items.title: AI SEO Audit Agent

items.description: Eve agent that drives a real browser with Playwright using a snapshot-and-selector pattern to complete web tasks.
items.name: eve/browser-agent
items.title: Browser Agent

items.description: Eve agent that indexes a PDF into a vector store and answers questions over it with page-cited retrieval.
items.name: eve/chat-with-pdf
items.title: Chat with PDF Agent

items.description: Eve agent that fetches a video's metadata and transcript, then answers questions with clickable timestamp citations.
items.name: eve/chat-with-youtube
items.title: Chat with YouTube Agent

items.description: Eve agent that operates a sandboxed workspace — read/write files and run shell commands — to finish multi-step tasks.
items.name: eve/claw
items.title: Claw Autonomous Assistant

items.description: Eve agent that indexes internal documents into a vector store and answers questions over them, with PII redaction.
items.name: eve/company-knowledge
items.title: Company Knowledge Agent

items.description: Eve agent that summarizes a CSV dataset to stay within token limits, then generates focused analytical questions.
items.name: eve/csv-to-questions
items.title: CSV to Questions Agent

items.description: Eve agent that researches a question, evaluates its own findings, and iterates until the answer is complete and cited.
items.name: eve/deep-search
items.title: Deep Search Agent

items.description: Eve agent that answers questions about a library's functions by looking up structured documentation.
items.name: eve/docs-chatbot
items.title: Docs Chatbot Agent

items.description: Eve agent that answers questions about libraries and APIs by searching the live web and citing sources.
items.name: eve/docs-expert
items.title: Docs Expert Agent

items.description: Eve agent that turns a domain into a self-contained DESIGN.md — gathering the styleguide, screenshot, and homepage Markdown from context.dev, then composing the document in a single Claude call with the screenshot as a vision image.
items.name: eve/extract-design-md
items.title: Extract DESIGN.md Agent

items.description: Eve agent that retrieves, categorizes, and summarizes customer feedback into an executive report with recommendations.
items.name: eve/feedback-summary
items.title: Customer Feedback Summary Agent

items.description: Eve agent that turns a PDF into study flash cards, with optional AI-generated images per concept.
items.name: eve/flashcards-pdf
items.title: Flash Cards from PDF Agent

items.description: Eve agent that fetches a GitHub pull request and returns adaptive, file-by-file code review feedback.
items.name: eve/github-review
items.title: GitHub PR Code Review Agent

items.description: Eve agent that reads, analyzes, and edits Google Sheets via the Sheets API.
items.name: eve/google-sheets
items.title: Google Sheets Analysis Agent

items.description: Eve agent that turns a raw meeting transcript into a structured summary, decisions, and action items.
items.name: eve/meeting-notes
items.title: Meeting Notes Agent

items.description: Eve agent that replies to Slack mentions and DMs, threaded, via the Slack Web API.
items.name: eve/slack-agent
items.title: Slack Agent

items.description: Eve agent that introspects a database schema, converts questions to SQL, and runs read-only queries.
items.name: eve/text-to-sql
items.title: Chat with Database Agent

items.description: Eve agent that looks up current weather for a location via the Open-Meteo API.
items.name: eve/weather
items.title: Weather Agent
